do: Tag the waypoint on the way through
Run straight through to Highgate
steps.layout: Linear channel — one direction, no branches.
steps.tip: Dialla waits mid-zone — talking to her is optional, the quest advances anyway.

do: Quick vendor check — Petarus and Vanja stock this act's gems
Take the south-west stairs down to The Dried Lake
Cross the lakebed to Voll's ruined camp
Kill Voll, Emperor of Purity — loot DESHRET'S BANNER
LOGOUT to town
steps.layout: You enter in the north-west; the camp is south-east — cut diagonally across.
steps.tip: Locals deal mostly lightning — a Topaz ring helps. Voll resists everything but only swings phys. No waypoint here; logout is the ride home.

do: Use Deshret's Banner on the Seal at the Mines entrance
Talk to Oyun → gem reward (Breaking the Seal)
IF you want Delve this league: talk to Niko at the Mines entrance
Enter The Mines Level 1
steps.tip: Good lab window: Normal Labyrinth (Aspirant's Plaza via Sarn WP) runs well at ~33–35 if your build wants its ascendancy now.

do: Push through to The Mines Level 2
steps.tip: Two cave levels, no waypoint until The Crystal Veins — hug one wall and keep moving.

do: Find Deshret's spirit and FREE it (An Indomitable Spirit — +1 passive on turn-in)
Continue to The Crystal Veins
Tag the waypoint
Talk to Dialla at the Rapture Device — she wants Kaom's and Daresso's eyes
Enter Kaom's Dream
steps.tip: The Burning Man explodes on death — pop him at range or walk off the corpse.

do: Climb through the burning dream to Kaom's Stronghold
steps.tip: Skip the packs you can — the totem/ambush spawns aren't worth the time.

do: Tag the waypoint on the way up
Kill King Kaom in the caldera at the top — loot THE EYE OF FURY
LOGOUT → in town, take the Book of Skill from Tasuni (+1 passive, 2 respec)
WP → The Crystal Veins, enter Daresso's Dream
steps.tip: Kaom hits very hard for the level — keep the fight mobile, don't facetank the leap.

do: Push through to The Grand Arena
steps.tip: Cage ambushes lock you in until the wave is dead — burn them fast rather than running.

do: Tag the waypoint
Kill Daresso in the arena at the end — loot THE EYE OF DESIRE
WP → The Crystal Veins
Hand BOTH eyes to Dialla → take the gem reward; she fires the Rapture Device
Enter the wound it opens: The Belly of the Beast Level 1
steps.tip: Daresso goes immune while arena adds pour in — clear them quickly, dodge his dash.

steps.zone: The Belly of the Beast Level 1
do: Follow the flesh corridors down to Level 2

steps.zone: The Belly of the Beast Level 2
do: Fight into the Bowels of the Beast and kill Piety, the Abomination
TALK to Piety's human form afterwards — required to open the path
Continue to The Harvest
steps.tip: Bleed city: Gut Flayers puncture and Piety's beam applies Corrupted Blood — a Staunching flask is close to mandatory.

do: Tag the waypoint
Kill the three organ guardians — Doedre, Shavronne, Maligaro — loot an organ from each
Deliver the organs to Piety at the Black Core door (Corpus Malachus)
Enter The Black Core
steps.layout: Boss platforms branch off the central chamber — sweep them one by one.
steps.tip: Do all three in one sitting — a fresh instance respawns them.

do: Phase 1: fight Malachai — let Piety's beam strip his immunity shield
Take the door in the arena centre → The Black Heart
steps.tip: Hardest fight of the campaign so far — pot early, keep moving, stand in nothing.

do: Phase 2: when Malachai drains a Heart of the Beast, kill that heart — three hearts, then finish him
Take the portal back to Highgate
Talk to Tasuni — closes The Eternal Nightmare, starts Return to Oriath
Stash, vendor, gem check before the level-40 zones
Exit to The Ascent
Climb the trail — the rope bridge marks halfway
Pull the lever at the Resonator on the summit → Oriath Portal
Portal → The Slave Pens → Act 5
steps.tip: No waypoint in here. Target: ~level 40 entering Act 5.
